prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: mid-depth creek-bank cutout reused in scenes 3 and 4 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample; match its right-side bank rocks, paper texture and ochre-gray palette
Primary request: a low irregular creek-bank strip with two weathered rocks and a flat grinding-stone base on the right third, empty and ready for the elderly-woman layer
Style/medium: premium layered cut-paper, visible fibers, matte mineral pigment, restrained ink
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key background; no people, hands, pestle, needle, text, watermark or logo; no #ff00ff in artwork; complete crisp silhouette
Avoid: photoreal stone, glossy 3D, extra props
